title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Mussalman Wakf (Repeal) Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 9th day of April, 2025, vide notification No. S.O. 1676 (E), dated 9th day of April, 2025, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
